race.comment: WONBOYN (4) had been well prepared for his debut and just came up short over 1450m at Kilmore.  Promising type with improvement to come and can go one better. CRISMERA (8) resumes and was last seen at Group level over a middle distance. She's had three Cranbourne jumpouts, and kicking off over 1500m shouldn't be a bother. Has plenty of scope for improvement and is likely to race well.  SHARE THE STARS (6) just missed over Kilmore over 1450m 39 days ago. She's still shy of her best but has the outside gate to manage. She can get into the finish with average luck. DARK GALAXY (3) resumed at Echuca and found one better. Had been away for a while and is sure to have taken fitness. In the mix.
